reviews.comment:
Un desastre la responsabilidad de la confitería, no respetan el horario en el que supuestamente abren con la excusa de "quedarse dormidos" y la atención de las mujeres que atienden deja mucho que desear!

(Translated by Google)
The confectionery shop's management is a disaster; they don't respect their supposed opening hours, using the excuse of "falling asleep," and the service from the women who work there leaves much to be desired!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5ME02RWhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo trato. Le preguntamos a una señora si se podía pasar al baño, no nos dijo ni hola solo que le preguntemos a los playeros y nos cerró la puerta del Baño con llave en la cara.
Desastre de atención🤮

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. We asked a woman if she could go to the bathroom, but she didn't even say hello, just told us to ask the beach attendants, and she locked the bathroom door in our faces.
Disastrous service🤮
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkdmJtZnd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en playa, En tienda no se, aparentemente cierran temprano (20h). Los baños también los cierran junto con la tienda, no ofrecen alternativa, ni si quiera para socios del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service on the beach. I don't know about the shop, but apparently they close early (8 pm). The restrooms also close at the same time as the shop; they don't offer any alternative, not even for ACA members.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención de un playero
Le pedi la llave del baño y me dijo q estaba en refacciones para no dármela justo paso a los 5 minutos y daba la casualidad de que sale gente del baño y entre y no estaba nada en refacciones la verdad un salame el playero  es el más joven de la estación 0 ganas de trabajar

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service from an attendant. I asked him for the bathroom key and he told me it was under repair, just to avoid giving it to me. I went back five minutes later, and it just so happened that people were leaving the bathroom. I went in and it wasn't under repair at all. Honestly, the attendant was a jerk. He's the youngest at the station and has zero motivation to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0cDRQbXNBRRAB
